data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"906c-6d9a","generatedAt":"2026-04-08T04:10:09Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Unify testing philosophy: instruction-file boundary rule and shared standard consolidation","description":"Extend behavioral-testing-standard.md with Rule 5 (instruction-file testing boundary). Replace implementation-plan's Behavioral Test Requirement section with a reference to the shared standard. Update TDD plan reviewer to reference the standard. Verify agents auto-consume. Smoke test on 8163-83a4.","successCriteria":["The shared behavioral testing standard contains a rule defining the testing boundary for non-executable artifacts","The shared behavioral testing standard contains the acceptable structural test categories and explicitly prohibits test -f existence checks and grep-based content assertions as change-detector tests","Implementation-plan's Behavioral Test Requirement section is replaced with a reference to the shared standard; the parallel rule set is eliminated","Implementation-plan's test approach requirement uses Given/When/Then framing per the shared standard's Rule 2","The TDD plan reviewer references the shared standard and scores instruction-file tasks against the boundary rule","Agents that already reference the standard by path automatically consume the new rule \u2014 verified by read-only path-reference confirmation","After deployment, re-running /dso:implementation-plan on the paused instruction-file story 8163-83a4 produces a plan that passes TDD plan review without deadlocking"]},"stories":[{"id":"e11a-6d2e","title":"As a test-writing agent, I follow a clear testing boundary rule for instruction files so I do not write change-detector tests for non-executable artifacts","description":"Add Rule 5 (instruction-file testing boundary) to behavioral-testing-standard.md. Define acceptable structural test categories. Prohibit test -f and grep-based content assertions.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, the shared behavioral testing standard contains a Rule 5 that defines the testing boundary for non-executable artifacts","When this story is complete, the shared behavioral testing standard lists acceptable structural test categories and explicitly prohibits test -f existence checks and grep-based content assertions","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] Structural test categories must not contradict the pre-commit test quality gate's anti-pattern rules","[Maintainability] Walking skeleton \u2014 all other stories depend on it"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"The shared behavioral testing standard contains a rule defining the testing boundary for non-executable artifacts"},{"id":"f691-f745","title":"As a sprint orchestrator, implementation-plan references the shared testing standard instead of maintaining a parallel rule set so testing requirements are consistent everywhere","description":"Replace Behavioral Test Requirement section with reference to shared standard. Reframe test approach to Given/When/Then. Keep planning-specific items.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, implementation-plan's Behavioral Test Requirement section is replaced with a reference to the shared standard","When this story is complete, implementation-plan's test approach requirement uses Given/When/Then framing per the shared standard's Rule 2","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Replacing section heading could break plan parsers expecting that heading","[Maintainability] Must be updated atomically with the shared standard"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e11a-6d2e"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Implementation-plan's Behavioral Test Requirement section is replaced with a reference to the shared standard"},{"id":"6e48-fced","title":"As a plan reviewer, the TDD reviewer references the shared standard and scores instruction-file tasks against the boundary rule","description":"Update TDD plan reviewer to reference the shared standard. Add scoring guidance for instruction-file tasks against boundary rule.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, the TDD plan reviewer references the shared standard and scores instruction-file tasks against the boundary rule","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] Reviewer scoring dimensions may need instruction-file-aware adjustment","[Maintainability] Reviewer should reference the standard by path for auto-consumption"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e11a-6d2e"],"satisfiesCriterion":"The TDD plan reviewer references the shared standard and scores instruction-file tasks against the boundary rule"},{"id":"5de2-b760","title":"As a developer, I verify that path-referencing agents auto-consume the new rule and the paused story produces a passing plan","description":"Read-only path-reference confirmation for 3 agents. Smoke test: re-run implementation-plan on 8163-83a4.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, agents that reference the standard by path are confirmed to auto-consume Rule 5","When this story is complete, re-running implementation-plan on 8163-83a4 produces a plan that passes TDD plan review"],"considerations":["[Testing] Smoke test depends on all three sibling implementation stories being complete","[Reliability] Story 8163-83a4 has its own dependencies that may need satisfying"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["f691-f745","6e48-fced"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Agents auto-consume the new rule; smoke test passes"},{"id":"2d0b-28c1","title":"Update project docs to reflect testing philosophy unification","description":"Update CLAUDE.md and other existing docs from 4-rule to 5-rule standard references. Remove references to old parallel Behavioral Test Requirement section.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, all existing project documentation accurately references the unified 5-rule behavioral testing standard","When this story is complete, no existing documentation references the removed Behavioral Test Requirement section"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e11a-6d2e","f691-f745","6e48-fced","5de2-b760"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation accuracy"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":5,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["e11a-6d2e","f691-f745","6e48-fced","5de2-b760","2d0b-28c1"]}}
